name: vscode-mcp-server
description: Exposes VS Code capabilities via an HTTP MCP server for AI tooling

vscode-mcp-server.port.description: Port for the MCP HTTP server

vscode-mcp-server.authToken.description: Optional bearer token. Clients must send Authorization: Bearer <token>. Empty string = no auth.

vscode-mcp-server.tlsCertPath.description: Path to TLS certificate PEM file. Requires tlsKeyPath. Enables HTTPS.

vscode-mcp-server.tlsKeyPath.description: Path to TLS private key PEM file. Requires tlsCertPath. Enables HTTPS.
